name: Binary / ELF Analyzer
description: checksec-style low-level analysis of compiled ELF binaries: missing NX/PIE/RELRO/stack-canary/FORTIFY protections, dangerous imported libc functions, and insecure RPATH/RUNPATH — using binutils.
author: NisargHunter AI core

path.description: ELF file or directory of binaries

permissions.reason: Reads the provided binary/directory to analyze it; does not execute the binary.
